entries.name: glad
entries.notes: OpenGL 4.1 Core profile loader. Pre-generated. Regenerate via https://glad.dav1d.de/ with profile=core, api=gl=4.1.

entries.name: glm
entries.notes: Header-only math library. Snapshot from vendor/glm/. No embedded version identifier; version reflects closest upstream release tag at time of snapshot.

entries.name: stb
entries.notes: Header-only image libraries. stb_image.h v2.30, stb_dxt.h included. No version identifiers beyond inline comments.

entries.name: ufbx
entries.notes: FBX parser amalgamation. Dual-licensed MIT / public domain — see vendor/ufbx/LICENSE.

entries.name: bc7enc
entries.notes: BC7 texture block encoder by Richard Geldreich Jr. MIT license or public domain.
